---
title: "Abdelkarim el Ghani<br/>"
subtitle: "<br/>Data Analyst | Neuroscientist<br/><br/><br/>"
format: html
toc: true
title-block-banner: "images/block-banner.jpeg"
title-block-banner-color: "white"
title-block-categories: true
page-layout: article
---



::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
**Welcome to My Portfolio!**\
I’m a statistical data analyst with expertise in uncovering insights from complex datasets. My work combines neuroscience and data science, focusing on statistical modeling, data visualization, and large-scale research management.

I specialize in neurodevelopmental data analysis and reproducible research, supporting data-driven solutions to advance our understanding of human behavior and science.

To dive into the projects I’ve worked on, visit my [**Projects**](projects.qmd) page, where you’ll find detailed insights into the work I’ve done, ranging from statistical modeling to data visualization.

If you'd like to know more about my background, skills, and experience, check out the [**About Me**](about.qmd) page.

:::
